hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not skip git hooks with --no-verify' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//' | sed 's/"//'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then echo 'TypeScript file modified — consider running npm run build to check types'; fi

PostToolUse.description: Reminder to type-check after editing TypeScript files

hooks.command: cd /Volumes/shorya/apps/circleso && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.ts$|\.tsx$' && echo 'Reminder: TypeScript files were modified. Run npm run build before committing.' || true

Stop.description: Remind to build-check before session ends if TS files changed
